meaning: n.波恩(原西德首都,位于莱茵河畔)
examples: Oxford is twinned with Bonn in Germany.
Kiev hopes to cement close links with Bonn.
In 1949 Bonn was a small, insignificant city.
The decision came during a meeting of the UNESCO World Heritage Committee in Bonn.
The die-hard optimists also think Bonn will keep Japanese support for the treaty intact.
